Software Engineer

DataHouse Consulting, Inc - Honolulu, HI
2012 to 2018

  • Architected, developed, and maintained public and internal facing web applications for the Department of Labor Industrial Relations Unemployment Insurance Office.
  • Architected, an developed modernization frameworks to migrate clients from legacy systems to cloud native technologies.
  • Maintained and managed development, test, staging, and production servers.
  • Developed automation and deployment utilities using git, bash, and Jenkins.
  • Developed automated unit and end to end testing using Karma, Mocha, Selenium and grunt.

RevaComm Inc - Honolulu, HI
2010 to 2012

  • Developed and maintained various Microsoft desktop and web applications.
  • Developed Microsoft applications interfacing with GIS, CAD, and Microsoft Office software.
  • Engineered IT solutions for clients that help to streamline processes using web-based applications.

  • Tested, reported, and performed quality control of developer code.
